posts.text: Getting rid of dark money would be one good start. Paying their damned taxes would be another. We can do both. theguardian.com/commentisfre…

Is Epstein’s accountant covering something up for Trump? These depositions are under oath. The Trump accuser’s lawyer disclosed to @postandcourier (text below) that she did indeed receive a settlement from Epstein’s estate, of which Mr. Kahn is both executor and beneficiary.




Oversight Dems (@OversightDems)

Republicans lose NOTHING by simply saying yes — except their ability to hold these agencies hostage for more ICE funding. It’s easy, just say YES!
How is this not simple?? We are fighting over reforming an out-of-control ICE. We have agreed to fully fund, no conditions attached, TSA, FEMA, Coast Guard and more. wsj.com/politics/policy/lawm…

I was glad to visit with Lastenia and her son today while participating in the #MarchForMeals initiative.

I’m very pleased that the funding to replace Providence’s aging, hodgepodge recycling carts comes from my bipartisan Save Our Seas 2.0 Act.

Trump actually said, “I don’t want the president of the United States to have a cognitive deficiency.”

Hard to know where to begin on that...
Zero indication that the Marshals Service is investigating orchestration of threats.

The judges are right to be angry. Attacks on them seem to be (a) coordinated and (b) designed to provoke curated “flying monkeys” of the internet willing to make vile threats.
